title: senecio odoratus
intro: Senecio odoratus, also known as stinking nelly or ragwort, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Senecio odoratus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe sore throats. Senecio odoratus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
